hooks.prompt: CRITICAL: Context is about to be compacted. You MUST call the orchestrator MCP `checkpoint` tool RIGHT NOW before any other action. Include: (1) summary of what was accomplished and current state, (2) any open questions, (3) next steps, (4) any in-flight work. This checkpoint will be your ONLY context after compaction. Do not skip this.

Before ending this session, do these orchestrator housekeeping tasks:
1. Call `checkpoint` with a summary of this session's work, open questions, and next steps.
2. Call `remember` for any decisions, insights, conventions, or anti-patterns discovered this session that haven't been recorded yet.
3. If any open_threads were resolved, call `resolve` on them.
Do this quickly and silently - the user doesn't need to see the details.

The subagent has finished. If it discovered any reusable patterns, conventions, anti-patterns, or made architectural decisions, use the orchestrator `remember` tool to persist them. If it encountered errors worth noting, record those too. Be selective - only record things that will matter in future sessions.
